github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Generate commit messages in English only. Use Conventional Commits format with a gitmoji between the scope and the description: `<type>(<scope>): <emoji> <description>`. The scope is optional but when used MUST be one of: conventional-commits, CI-CD. Types and their emoji: feat → ✨, fix → 🐛, docs → 📝, refactor → ♻️, test → ✅, chore → 🔧, perf → 🚀, style → 💄, ci → 👷, build → 📦, revert → ⏪. Always include the emoji. Keep the description short (≤72 chars), lowercase, imperative mood, no period at the end. If there are multiple logical changes, use a bullet list in the body. Examples: `feat(conventional-commits): ✨ add PR title validation`, `fix(CI-CD): 🐛 fix checkout depth`, `docs: 📝 update usage examples`.
